single-room.purpose: Campaign 1 — Single Room Refresh (B2C, Meta Lead Form)

ad_units.production_notes: Vertical crop works for Stories/Reels; for feed use center 80%. Upscale to 1080px minimum.

ad_units.scene: Empty bright living room, white walls, after
ad_units.production_notes: Clean composition, neutral. Best feed image for ad 1A (before/after implied).

ad_units.scene: Pink bedroom with floral accent wall, after
ad_units.production_notes: Color story. For targeting 35-55 female homeowners.

ad_units.scene: Two painters giving thumbs up in finished bedroom
ad_units.production_notes: Trust signal. Real Arcan crew. Use for ad 1B (painter-on-site angle). Highest trust of all 13.

re-listing.purpose: Campaign 2 — Real Estate Pre-Listing (B2B agents, Meta)

ad_units.scene: Modern living room, vibrant blue accent wall, after
ad_units.production_notes: Hero ad image. TV-mount + fireplace = aspirational for agents. 'Staging' angle.

ad_units.scene: Bold blue accent wall painting in progress, drop cloths, ladder
ad_units.production_notes: DURING phase shot. Shows the work happening, not just result. Use for carousel card 2/3.

ad_units.scene: Modern bedroom with dark navy accent wall, after
ad_units.production_notes: Bedroom niche. Staging for resale often needs neutral-to-bold swap.

ad_units.scene: Painter on ladder applying finish to hand-painted mural accent wall
ad_units.production_notes: Best for video cover frame (ad 3A). Painter in white overalls, orange ladder, real mural. Demonstrates skill.

ad_units.scene: Painter in Benjamin Moore shirt, roller on light blue wall, drop cloths
ad_units.production_notes: Best single-image ad (3B). Painter clearly wearing brand shirt, room identifiable as GTA home, professional gear.

ad_units.scene: Painter in hoodie painting white balusters on staircase, drop cloths
ad_units.production_notes: Taller aspect ratio = better for Stories. Use as 9:16 video cover.

brand.purpose: Campaign 4 (Google Brand Conquest) + general trust layer

ad_units.scene: Painter on scaffolding spray-painting commercial ceiling, red beams, white brick walls
ad_units.production_notes: ONLY commercial 'during' shot. Use in any commercial-targeted ad or to show scale.

ad_units.scene: Commercial dining room, vibrant multi-pattern wallpaper, matte black ceiling, pink chairs
ad_units.production_notes: Upscale/boutique commercial work. Use in specialty/niche ad sets.

ad_units.scene: Cañabate family — Jose and three sons (Pablo, Gerardo, JJ) painting a Toronto house
ad_units.production_notes: FAMILY STORY image. Use as 'About' hero on landing pages, or as a Google RSA sitelink image. NOT in feed ads (too busy for 1:1 crop). This is the human story of the business — leverage it.

production_notes.image_quality_warning: All arcanpainting.ca images are 400-533px wide (low-res WebP thumbnails). Meta requires 1080x1080 minimum for feed, 1080x1920 for Stories. Use these for concept mocks and ad preview only. For production launch, request full-res originals from Gerardo or upload upscaled versions.
upscaling_options: Topaz Gigapixel AI (one-time $99, batch upscale 2-4x with no quality loss) — RECOMMENDED
Adobe Photoshop 'Preserve Details 2.0' upscale (if PS available)
Avoid browser-based upscales (Let’s Enhance etc.) — quality ceiling is too low
production_notes.color_profiles: WebP thumbnails likely sRGB. Verify in Photoshop after upscaling.
production_notes.watermarks: No watermarks detected on any of the 13 downloaded images. Safe for direct ad use with permission (which Arcan owns them).
people_in_images: PXL_20260213_211346296_thumb.webp: 2 painters visible (faces not super clear but clearly identifiable as crew)
PXL_20251009_180850831_thumb.webp: 1 painter visible from behind, on ladder
VID-20260212-WA0034_video_thumb.webp: 1 painter visible, back to camera
canabate-family.jpg: 4 people visible, all family members
production_notes.model_release_status: Need to confirm with Gerardo. Painter faces mostly obscured or backs to camera = safer. Family photo = assume consent but verify.
